meta.title: A.I. MIDIs is all you need!
meta.description:
Get ready to unleash your inner music genius with the help of AI! In this video, we'll show you how to use Spotify Basic Pitch, OpenAI MuseNet,  Google Magenta and other A.I. MIDI projects to create MIDI files that will blow your mind.
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Jump on the hype train for this channel, and help me crank out even more wicked videos like this one:
https://www.patreon.com/NobodyandTheComputer
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------
contact me: 
nobodyandthecomputer@gmail.com

BASIC PITCH: 
https://basicpitch.spotify.com/
MUSENET: 
https://openai.com/research/musenet
MAGENTA STUDIO: 
https://magenta.tensorflow.org/studio/
LOS ANGELES MUSIC COMPOSER: 
https://github.com/asigalov61/Los-Angeles-Music-Composer

00:00 Intro
00:50 History of MIDIS
01:57 What is MIDI
02:52 Spotify Basic Pitch
04:00 OpenAI Musenet
04:25 Google Magenta Studio
08:04 Los Angeles Music Composer
08:40 The End

So why wait? Join us as we explore the cutting-edge world of MIDI and AI, and unleash your music genius!
